# Agent Review References

Reusable references for reviewing and maintaining `.agent.md` files.

## Assets

- agent-review-report-template.md: review report scaffold for per-agent findings.
  - Source: [agent-review-report-template.md](./agent-review-report-template.md)
- source-catalog.md: tracked source inventory for platform-currency checks in AGR-S5.
  - Source: [source-catalog.md](./source-catalog.md)
- history/: per-agent review history files.
  - Source: [history/README.md](./history/README.md)
